description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, print above left hem, lee badge with glitter print on the inside nack neck, with lace in-seamFittingComfortWash care Hand wash cold Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Subtly stylish, this purple t-shirt with lee's determination to continue doling out fantabulous products described with the graphic print above the left hem. Flaunt your style mantra in this cotton tee and stay comfortable all day. Team it with jeans or skirts and sleek, heeled sandals for that chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
